headings: Procedures for the Provision of Water:
text: - [ ]  GS Mountain employees will be reminded of the importance of their workforce drinking water frequently. When the temperature exceeds, or is expected to exceed, 80 degrees Fahrenheit, brief subcontractor 'toolbox' meetings will be held with employees each morning to review the importance of drinking water, the number and schedule of water and rest breaks, and the signs and symptoms of heat illness.
